//: DS Platform prod — Centrifugo v6 config for webinar room chat (#729 / DSO-134, deploy-slice spec §2.1). NON-SECRET shape only.
//secrets: The two secrets are injected as env vars from /etc/ds-platform/api.env (compose env_file) using Centrifugo's native names: CENTRIFUGO_HTTP_API_KEY (= the api's CENTRIFUGO_API_KEY) and CENTRIFUGO_CLIENT_TOKEN_HMAC_SECRET_KEY (= the api's CENTRIFUGO_TOKEN_HMAC_SECRET). Env overrides config, so no placeholder values live in this file — a missing env var fail-closes (no valid tokens / no authorized publish), never falls back to a committed default.
//origins: Browsers connect from the portal room page (app.doctor.school) to wss://api.doctor.school/connection/websocket (Caddy route). Pin the browser origin — the dev-stand's "*" is a dev-only convenience.
//channel: Same `room` namespace contract as the dev-stand (infra/dev-stand/centrifugo/config.json — 006 EARS-3): clients are subscribed server-side via the token's `channels` claim, can NEVER publish (allow_publish_for_client pinned false; every post rides the api's gated PostChatMessage over the HTTP API), and may read bounded history to hydrate mid-webinar joins. Retention (`history_ttl` 14400s = 4h) spans a full webinar + margin so a mid-webinar reload/resubscribe after a quiet stretch still hydrates the conversation, never an empty pane over a live room; `history_size` stays bounded at 100 (#1124).
